en.title: Mobile Fitness App
en.previewText: A cross-platform fitness tracking app with workout plans, progress analytics, and social features for community engagement.

es.title: Mobile Fitness App
es.previewText: Una app cross-platform de fitness con rutinas, analiticas de progreso y funciones sociales para impulsar constancia.
es.imageAlt: Vista previa de una app mobile de fitness

en.title: Mobile Fitness App
en.subtitle: A mobile product focused on helping users track routines, progress, and engagement more consistently.
paragraphs: This case study looks at a cross-platform fitness experience designed to make daily activity tracking more motivating and easier to sustain.

es.title: Mobile Fitness App
es.subtitle: Un producto mobile orientado a ayudar a usuarios a seguir rutinas, progreso y engagement de forma mas constante.
paragraphs: Este caso de estudio recorre una experiencia cross-platform de fitness disenada para hacer mas motivador y sostenible el seguimiento diario de actividad.

media.alt: Imagen principal de una app mobile de fitness

en.title: Context
paragraphs: The product needed to balance usability, habit formation, and a clear mobile-first experience for recurring engagement.

es.title: Contexto
paragraphs: El producto necesitaba equilibrar usabilidad, formacion de habito y una experiencia claramente mobile-first para interaccion recurrente.

en.title: Approach
paragraphs: We focused on simple navigation, meaningful progress feedback, and a structure that supported both planning and consistency.

es.title: Enfoque
paragraphs: Se priorizo navegacion simple, feedback de progreso util y una estructura que acompanara tanto la planificacion como la constancia.

en.title: Outcome
paragraphs: The resulting app experience emphasized clarity, momentum, and a more engaging path for users following their routines.

es.title: Resultado
paragraphs: La experiencia final puso el foco en claridad, continuidad y un recorrido mas atractivo para usuarios siguiendo sus rutinas.
